strengths: 20 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Genuine entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains GISCollective, a production open-source geo-data platform adopted by NGOs globally
Recent hands-on AI tooling work at re:cinq (2025): MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks directly relevant to the AI builder requirement
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and recent — only one role (April 2025) touches AI; no prior ML/AI engineering history, no recognized AI products, no academic AI background

No director-level IC or strategic advisory evidence — titles cap at Staff Software Engineer; nothing in the resume demonstrates influencing product or platform strategy at organizational scale or advising external customers
Cloud skills are surface-level — AWS CDK in one pricing-team role and Kubernetes for a side project; no cloud platform architecture, cloud-native design, or cloud strategy work at scale
response.justification: The role requires a recognized AI expert operating at director-level scope — shaping cloud AI product strategy, advising strategic customers, and driving disruptive technical thinking. Bogdan has 20 years of solid software craftsmanship, genuine entrepreneurial initiative via GISCollective, and a recent pivot into AI tooling (MCP generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq). However, the AI work is a single role begun in 2025 with no prior ML/AI engineering depth, no published AI platforms, and no evidence of recognized AI expertise in the market. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK in a pricing-team context. Most critically, there is no evidence of director-level IC behavior: no strategic customer engagements, no organizational-scale influence, and no published thought leadership in AI or cloud. The candidate is a strong senior/staff IC who has recently started building toward AI, but falls substantially short of the strategic depth and AI specialization this principal-level role demands.
